title: Studio Calico Double Scoop Kits
excerpt: It's that time again - the reveal of the Studio Calico kits . I love Double Scoop . The phrase actually speaks volumes to me considering at my last doctor's appointment, I gained 6 pounds! Well, to be honest, the…
body:
It's that time again - the reveal of the Studio Calico kits. I love Double Scoop. The phrase actually speaks volumes to me considering at my last doctor's appointment, I gained 6 pounds! Well, to be honest, the appointment just a week before revealed that I had lost 2 pounds, so I guess I was just giving in to all the food cravings I was having. Not concerned with the numbers on the scale, just happy that the little guy is kicking it into high gear with being healthy and growing at a good rate. To see details about each layout, simply click on the photo to take you directly to see the kits and supplies used.

For this layout, I used the main scrapbook kit only. The rubber Thickers are from my newest release, Cut & Paste which isn't even available yet. Tomorrow I will be back to show you how it came together.
